name: @gjsify/integration-rolldown-native
description: Integration tests for @gjsify/rolldown-native — locks in the Phase D-2.B plugin-bridge contract end-to-end. Exercises bundleWithPlugins() under GJS with the full hook surface (load/transform/resolveId/renderChunk/banner/footer/intro/outro/buildStart/End/generateBundle), the per-hook id-regex filter short-circuit (B.2), and the nested protocol for plugin-context callbacks (B.3 — this.resolve / this.warn / this.error). GJS-only because the native bridge needs the Vala/GIR typelib that only loads under SpiderMonkey + GLib.

scripts.test: npm run build:test && npm run test:gjs

author: Pascal Garber <pascal@artandcode.studio>
